resources.string: Bypasses eSIM requirements for certain apps and can be used to retrieve eSIM codes.
LSPosed is not activated, or your environment is not supported. Please check your framework status.
Spoof eSIM support to retrieve eSIM codes.\nSelect the apps you want to spoof.

Fixes access issues on devices where eUICC [ISD-R] has exclusive access.\nRequires selecting [com.android.phone] and rebooting.\nNote: Hot-swapping is not supported. Insert the eUICC card before rebooting.
Bypass ARA/ARF restrictions. Typically used for OMAPI access on cards without ARA.\nRequires selecting [com.android.se] and rebooting.\nNote: Do not enable unless specifically required.
Hide the module icon from the launcher.
